meta.siteDescription: We warmly invite you to the wedding of Tae-Geun Kim and Andrea Karin Morgen.
meta.ogImageAlt: Wedding invitation for Tae-Geun Kim and Andrea Karin Morgen

greeting.title: Two of us, opening a new chapter
greeting.body:
What began as a pen-pal correspondence has grown into the most beautiful journey of our lives. The memories we have gathered together through Korea, Germany, China, Hong Kong, and Japan are now opening a new chapter.
We would be deeply honoured if you would join us at our wedding in Seoul and share in our joy on this special day.

schedule.title: On the day
schedule.footnote: * Ceremony and reception run on a private floor for about two hours from the start (until ~19:30). Please let us know whether you can join the after-party in your RSVP.

journey.title: How we met
journey.intro: It started with a single letter, and grew into a road that connects Seoul and Mannheim.
journey.previewHint: Open the map to walk through every scene.
journey.reducedMotionNote: Animations are reduced. Showing every moment at once.

secretLetter.title: A letter for you
secretLetter.intro: Enter the 12-character code we sent you to unfold a personal note.
secretLetter.invalid: We couldn't find that code. Please double-check it.
secretLetter.lockedBody: You can try again in {seconds} seconds.
secretLetter.missingTranslation: Showing the original Korean text. An English version is on the way.

directions.title: Getting there
directions.fallbackNote: If the map doesn't load, please use the buttons above.
directions.stayIntro: Business hotels within a 10–15 min subway ride of Venuevian. Rates vary by date — please verify before booking.

accounts.title: Sending your gift
accounts.intro: For those who can't be there in person — your kindness means a lot.
accounts.comingSoon: Bride-side bank details will be added soon.
accounts.copyFailed: Copy failed. Please long-press to copy manually.

share.title: Share the invitation
share.intro: Pass this invitation along to family and friends.

rsvp.title: RSVP
rsvp.intro: So we can prepare warmly, please let us know whether you can join the ceremony — and the after-party.
rsvp.newWindowHint: A Google Form will open in a new tab.

guestbook.title: Guestbook
guestbook.intro: Leave a kind word for the two of us.
guestbook.empty: Be the first to leave a note.
guestbook.errorBody: Please try again in a moment.

footer.thanks: Thank you for being part of our day.
